title: The Running of α_EM in Integer Arithmetic
abstract: The QED running of the electromagnetic coupling constant α_EM from the Z boson mass to atomic scale is computed in exact rational arithmetic. Every intermediate value is a ratio of two integers. Seven measured rationals enter the computation; all transcendentals (π, ln) are represented as exact integer pairs at 100+ digit precision via [@HOWL-MATH-2-2026]. The result — 1/α_EM = 137.0360025 — matches CODATA 2022 (137.0359992) to 0.02 parts per million.
